title: MinimumTransferAmountRatingsBased
description: Defines that the Minimum Transfer Amount (MTA) is based on a Ratings condition(s).

zeroEvent.description: Indicates whether a trigger applies for the Threshold or Minimum Transfer Amount to fall to zero. If 'True' then such a trigger exists.

event.description: Specifies the relevant trigger for the Threshold or Minimum Transfer Amount to fall to zero.

currency.description: The minimum transfer amount currency code.

variableSet.description: Defines a combination of Rating Agency, Rating Value, amount and Currency code.

ratedParty.description: The party to which a rating applies.

namedEntity.description: Details the Named Entity where the Rated Party is Named Entity.

namedAffiliate.description: Details the Named Affiliate where the Rated Party is Named Affiliate.

compare.description: Where two ratings are specified whether the higher or lower rating prevails.

noRating.description: What conditions apply where a party has no rating.

notRatedBy.description: Defines where conditions apply if no Rating where ratings may not exist.

numberOfRatingAgencies.description: Defines the number of Rating Agencies that the Party must be rated by.
